verses.text: Ka lutang tuikhuk hong hithei hen la, ka mitte khitui nak hong hithei leh ka mite' kithahlupna hangin a sun a zanin ka kapkap ding hi
Sehnel gamlakah khawlna ding bukno khat nei thei-in ka mite nusia-in a taisan thei hi leng ka ut hi. A vekpi-un angkawm hat hi khin uh a, thumanlo kim uh hi
A leii uh thalpeu bangin zang uh a, zuauthu bekbek a lawn khiakhia uh hi. Gamsungah thuman omloin zuauthu bekbek a dim hi. Siatna lam manawh tektek uh a, kei hong theilo uh hi, Topa in a ci hi
Mi khempeuh a inn vengte uh kidawm uh hen la, a sanggamte uh muang kei uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh sanggamte khem hat ciat uh a, inn vengte khempeuh zong gensiat hat ciat uh hi
Mi khempeuh in a vengte uh khem ciat uh a, thuman gen kuamah omlo hi. A leii uh zuauthu gen dingin kisinsak uh a, mawhna a bawl manun tawllua uh a, kisikzo nawnlo uh hi
Siatna khat khit siatna khat, a banbanin gamta uh a, zuau zong a phuakphuak uh hi. Kei hong thei nuamlo uh hi, Topa in a ci hi
Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah, “En un, amaute a sian'thona dingun suangtui-in ka ze-et ding hi. Tualo ka mite bangcih nawn ding ka hi hiam
A leii uh thaltang lauhuai bang a, zuauthu a gen uh hi. A kam uh tawh a inn vengte kiangah a aw-zol uh hangin, a sihna ding uh a lungsim sung uhah a ngaihsun veve mawk uh hi
Hih thute hangin gim pialo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Hih bang minam khat tungah ka phu lalo ding ka hi hiam

“Mualte-a' dingin kapin tau un la, gamlak lonona munte-a' dingin thumin tau un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate keu gawp a, kuamah pai nawnlo hi. Bawng ham zong kiza nawnlo a, vana leeng vasate leh gamsate a taimangta uh hi
“Jerusalem khuapi ninkholna ka bangsak ding a, se-alte' ten'na mun ka suaksak ding hi. Judah gam khuapite gamlak ka suaksak ding a, kuamah teng nawnlo ding hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kisiatna ding leh Salsuahna ding tawh Tawn'na

verses.text: Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hih thu a theitel ding mipil kua om ahi hiam? Hih thu a gentel theihna dingin Topa in kua tungah hilhtel na hi hiam? Kuamah in hih gam a kantan nawnlohna dingin bang hangin kisia-in gamlak tawh kibang ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi
Topa in, “Amaute in a mai uha ka lah ka thukham nusia uh a, ka thu hong mangloin ka cih bangin talo uh a
amau' lungsim deihna zui tentanin a pu a pate uh hilhna bangin Baal nung a zuih man uh ahi hi
Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah: En in, hih mite gamsai-in ka vak ding a, gutui ka dawnsak ding hi
Amaute leh a pute a pate' theih ngeilohna gamdangah ka kithehthangsak ding a, a sih khit dong uh namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah, “Ngaihsun un la, numei kapte a hong pai dingin va sam un la, a kah siam tata vaikhak un,” a ci hi
Mite in, “Va kinawhsak un la, i khitui a luan'theihna ding, i mitkhu a kawt theihna dingin eite hong kah uh hen,” a ci uh hi
Zion khua panin a kiza kahna awging in, “I kisia khinzo a, i zumhuai mahmah khinzo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in i innte hong suksiatsak uh ahih manin i gam i nusia ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “No numeite aw, Topa' kammal ngai dih un. A kam pana hong gingkhia thu na bil uhah lutsak un. Na tanute uh a kah dan ding hilh un la, na inn vengte ciat uh kah la hilh un
Bang hang hiam cih leh tawlet vang panin sihna hong lut a, kumpipa' innsungah zong sihna hong lut hi. Kongzinga naupangte vatmang a, sumbuka tangvalte vatlum hi
Gamlaka ki-tha ek bangin misi luang kipaithang ding a, buhlom atsa kinusia bangin kuamah in a khawm kei ding hi, ci-in a gen dingin Topa in kei hong sawl hi,” ka ci hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mipilte in a pilna uh kisaktheihpih kei uh hen la, mi hatte in a hatna uh kisaktheihpih kei uh hen. Mihaute in zong a hauhna uh kisaktheihpih kei uh hen
A kisatheite in, keimah, leitungah migitna, thuman leh thutang a zang ka hihna leh tuate sungah nuam a sapa ka hihna thu hong theihna uhah kisathei uh hen. Topa in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a ci hi
Topa in, “Vun ki-at hinapi-in vun ki-at mite' gamtat bangin a gamtalote gimpiak hun hong tung ding hi

Egypt mite, Judah mite, Edom mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite leh a sam uh a mettom sehnel gama omte khempeuh zong gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih gamte khempeuh in a vun uh atlo uh a, Israel mi khempeuh zong a lungsim sung uhah vun atlohpi ahi uh hi,” a ci hi.
